videoSnippet.title: The Prince and The King || Norway Chess 2026 Starts With A Big Bang!
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Firouzja, Alireza (2759) - Carlsen, Magnus (2840)
Norway Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [01] 2026.05.25
D37 Queen's Gambit Declined, 4.Nf3

1.d4 d5 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 Nf6 4.Nc3 h6 5.a3 c5 6.cxd5 exd5 7.Bf4 Nc6 8.e3 a6 9.Be2 c4 10.Ne5 Bd6 11.O-O O-O 12.Bg3 Bf5 13.f4 Be7 14.Bf3 Rc8 15.Rc1 b5 16.Be1 b4 17.axb4 Bxb4 18.Bh4 Bxc3 19.bxc3 Qd6 20.Ra1 Ne4 21.Rxa6 f6 22.Bxe4 Bxe4 23.Ng4 Qd7 24.Nf2 Ne7 25.Qe2 Rc6 26.Rxc6 Qxc6 27.Nxe4 dxe4 28.Ra1 Nd5 29.Be1 Rb8 30.f5 Kh7 31.Qg4 Qd7 32.Qxe4 Re8 33.Qg4 Kg8 34.e4 Ne3 35.Qf3 Nc2 36.Rc1 Na3 37.Bg3 Nb5 38.e5

00:57 Huge Party Incoming!

14:10 Pragg vs Wesley
19:50 Gukesh vs Vincent
26:00 STANDINGS after Round 1
